title: Domicile of commission
doc_html:
§2. Domicile of department

            The domicile of Louisiana Works shall be in Baton Rouge.

            Acts 1989, No. 512, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1990; Acts 1992, No. 447, §1, eff. June 20, 1992; Acts 2008, No. 743, §2, eff. July 1, 2008; Acts 2025, No. 478, §7, eff. Oct. 1, 2025.
doc_text:
§2.  Domicile of department
The domicile of Louisiana Works shall be in Baton Rouge.
Acts 1989, No. 512, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1990; Acts 1992, No. 447, §1, eff. June 20, 1992;
Acts 2008, No. 743, §2, eff. July 1, 2008; Acts 2025, No. 478, §7, eff. Oct. 1, 2025.
